title: TofuPopper Bliss
description: A buttery, creamy, show-off Venezuelan dish featuring toffee popcorn, tadka, and whole30-friendly.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a baking dish.
In a pan, gently fry the Toasted Tofu until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Set aside.

Pour the Popcorn, Buttered into another pan and warm until hot, stirring occasionally. Add Egg to the mixture and stir thoroughly while it heats up; cook for an additional minute before setting aside.

In a separate pan, add Tadka Seasoning Mix followed by Sugar Syrup Mix and pour in Heavy Cream. Heat gently but ensure no burning occurs, about 3-5 minutes. Let cool slightly before adding Toasted Tofu and Popcorn mixture. Fold together carefully to combine.

Combine Buttery Cheese Sauce Mix with Creme Fraiche; stir until smooth. Add the cheesy sauce over top of tofu-popcorn mixture and bake for another 20 minutes or until golden and bubbling around edges.
